capabilities: Add, remove, or reorder Part 1 questions (prompt, Japanese blank, romaji blank, hint)
Add, remove, or reorder Part 2 roleplay scenarios and speaker lines
Edit Learning Objectives and Instructions text
Edit Pronunciation Tips and Printing & Formatting Tips
Edit banner titles (e.g. 'Beginner Japanese', 'Greetings & Essential Phrases')
Edit info row labels (Name, Class, Date, Period)
Edit Answer Key rows (prompt, Japanese, romaji, notes) to match Part 1
Edit Teacher's Notes & Suggested Activities (title + description pairs)
Change colours by using palette names in helpers (see palette)
Add new sections using heading(), body(), blank_line(), divider(), page_break()

set_cell_bg.desc: Table cell background. color = palette name.

add_run.desc: Add styled run to paragraph. color from palette.

blank_line.desc: Label + underline line; optional romaji hint in grey.

page_1: Part 1 — all 10 questions (fits on one page)

data_arrays.questions: List of (prompt, jp_blank, ro_blank, hint). Edit in Part 1 loop.
data_arrays.scenarios: List of (title, list of (speaker, cue)). Edit in Part 2.
data_arrays.answers: List of (prompt, japanese, romaji, note). Must match questions count/order for Answer Key.

rules: Keep answers array in sync with questions (same count and order).
Use palette names (NAVY, TEAL, etc.) when calling helpers that take color.
Do not remove or rename helper functions; only change document content and data lists.
After editing japanese_greetings_worksheet.py, run it to regenerate japanese_greetings_worksheet.docx.
